topPlaces.name: Mahoba
topPlaces.description: Mahoba is a city in Mahoba District of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh in the Bundelkhand region, well known for the ninth century granite Sun temple built in Pratihara style. It is also well known for the 24 rock-cut Jain tirthankara image on Gokhar hill.

topPlaces.name: Senapati fortress
topPlaces.description: Senapati fortress was built in 1700 A.D. by Senapati of Chhatrasal Bundela on a hill at the western end of the city at Kulpahar.

items.note: Mahoba is a city in Mahoba District of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh in the Bundelkhand region, well known for the ninth century granite Sun temple built in Pratihara style. It is also well known for the 24 rock-cut Jain tirthankara image on Gokhar hill.
Senapati fortress was built in 1700 A.D. by Senapati of Chhatrasal Bundela on a hill at the western end of the city at Kulpahar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vijai Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vijai Sagar Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vijai Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (135 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vijai Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vijai Sagar Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vijai Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Vijai Sagar Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vijai Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahoba, Senapati fortress.
